title: EquityIntelligence
intent: Cap table, vesting, and round scenario intelligence for founders and finance teams
requirements: cap-table module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
shareholders module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
vesting module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
rounds module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
dilution module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
option-pool module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
